source_document: Measures for the Labeling of AI-Generated Synthetic Content

source_document: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
control_objective: Face voice or biometric-like actor materials should be classified and protected before processing

source_document: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services
